mapper.select:
select bi.background_image_id , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.image_files_resource_key , bi.upload_time ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM background_image bi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='background_image' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=bi.background_image_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select bi.background_image_id , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.image_files_resource_key , bi.upload_time ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM background_image bi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='background_image' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=bi.background_image_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select bi.background_image_id , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.image_files_resource_key , bi.upload_time ,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name FROM background_image bi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='background_image' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=bi.background_image_id
where bi.background_image_id = #{id}
